data.query: Locate each visible product card in the General Supplies grid during 81s-82s, especially the top-row items and any other cards with a visible dollar price. Include regions that preserve the item title and its attached price together when possible.

groundings.spatial_description:

First, the top row:

2. Scept: [335, 406, 465, 737] - price $11.99

4. GE: [675, 406, 805, 737] - price $17.99
5. Slime: [845, 406, 975, 737] - price $19.99

Then the second row:
